name: Fisherman
text: My grandad used to talk about her all the time.

name: Fisherman
text: That she was the reason this village exists.

name: Fisherman
text: Twelve people, no money, one plan that made no sense.

name: Fisherman
text: He said she just started building. So everyone else did too.

name: You
text: She doesn't seem to remember much of it.

name: Fisherman
text: Grandad made me promise something before he died.

name: Fisherman
text: To bring her fish every Friday. Same as he did.

name: Fisherman
text: He said as long as someone remembers, she's not really lost.

name: You
text: That's a good promise to keep.

name: Fisherman
text: I'll go see her. It's been too long.
